cases.question: According to the Clipper Duet manual, what does the depth display show?
cases.answer: According to the manual, the depth display shows depth at all times. If the echo is temporarily lost, the depth units will momentarily flash. If the echo is completely lost, the display will show OUT.

cases.question: According to the Clipper Duet manual, how do you change the shallow alarm setting?
cases.answer:
According to the manual, to change the shallow alarm setting:

1.  Select the required minimum depth setting.
2.  Press SPEED. This will enter the new value into memory and return to normal operation.

To arm the alarm, press TRIP and TOTAL simultaneously. Pressing TRIP and TOTAL simultaneously a second time will disable the alarm (without altering the alarm setting).
